name: Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the extrusion of aluminum alloy profiles. It processes aluminum alloy parts. The company's products and operations include pressing, heat transmission heatsink, communication heatsink, standard heatsink, aluminum precision parts, GPS heatsink, electromagnetic shielding shell, high finned heatsink, battery power supply heatsink, medium voltage drive heatsink, moto housing, heatsink samples, pump body, industrial profile, TV station heatsink, filter housing, LED heatsink, inserted fins assembly heatsink, train traction heatsink, and actuator housing. Its products are used in various applications, such as medical equipment, safety material of automobile light weight, and products of fluid control. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Ruixinchang Light Alloy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd in November, 2017. Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2004 and is based in Tianjin, China.
